competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1/2(HN Algolia、cursor.com直连)本次仍均403，转WebSearch。检索到v3.9 Customize Page（6/22，晚于6/20 baseline的3.8/Automations）：'plugins, skills, MCPs, subagents, rules, commands, and hooks'统一管理入口，team leaderboard。另检索到Design Mode进入canvas：'select and annotate UI elements directly in a canvas to guide Cursor's edits'，以及'agent's context usage as an interactive report in a canvas'。均无法用WebFetch核实官方原文，仅WebSearch摘要可信度。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1/2(HN Algolia、cursor.com直连)本次仍均403，转WebSearch。检索到v3.9 Customize Page（6/22，晚于6/20 baseline的3.8/Automations）：'plugins, skills, MCPs, subagents, rules, commands, and hooks'统一管理入口，team leaderboard。另检

changes.description: Cursor 3.9 Customize Page：插件/skills/MCP/subagent/hook统一管理与团队排行榜

key_findings: v3.9 Customize Page（6/22）：插件/MCP/subagent统一管理入口+团队排行榜
Design Mode将canvas标注能力扩展到UI编辑引导，与context可视化report

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch:Anthropic Claude Design Code Sync brand controls
competitors.raw_snapshot: HN Algolia与anthropic.com直连本次仍均403，转WebSearch核实了上次报告中'留待下次核实'的Claude Design信号。确认Claude Design原始发布为4/17（早于baseline，非新），但其6/17的重大更新（早于上次报告标注的6/20 cutoff，属于此前未捕获的历史缺口，本次补记）包含Code Sync能力：开发者用'/design-sync'将GitHub repo中的design system拉入Claude Design canvas，用'/design'在terminal中创建/编辑/同步design项目，目标是让canvas原型与代码双向往来（VentureBeat称'code round-trips'）。这是canvas↔terminal的双向同步，而非单向snapshot导出。无法通过WebFetch核实anthropic.com官方原文（持续403），引用均来自WebSearch对三方报道（TechRepublic/VentureBeat/letsdatascience）的转述。
competitors.content_hash: HN Algolia与anthropic.com直连本次仍均403，转WebSearch核实了上次报告中'留待下次核实'的Claude Design信号。确认Claude Design原始发布为4/17（早于baseline，非新），但其6/17的重大更新（早于上次报告标注的6/20 cutoff，属于此前未捕获的历史缺口，本次补记）包含Code Sync能力：开发者用'/design-sync'

changes.description: Claude Design新增Code Sync：/design-sync从GitHub repo拉取design system到canvas；/design在terminal中创建/编辑/同步canvas项目，实现canvas与代码的双向round-trip
changes.evidence: "Developers can use /design-sync to pull a design system into Claude Design, while /design lets them create, edit, and sync design projects from the terminal"（WebSearch转述，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点2（跨工具artifact live link，非snapshot）直接相关：canvas设计稿与代码仓库间建立双向同步通道而非一次性导出/导入

key_findings: 确认Claude Design原始发布4/17，非本轮新变化
Code Sync（6/17发布，此前未核实，本次确认）是本次最强信号：canvas-terminal双向同步直接触碰meee2核心差异化锚点2

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot: github.blog全域(feed+文章页)本次仍均403，转WebSearch。检索到两条晚于6/20 baseline的变化（均6/23）：1) Copilot CLI新终端界面GA，引入Session/Gists/Issues/Pull requests多标签布局；2) Copilot App新增BYOK支持，可用自有模型provider(含Anthropic/Ollama等)运行agent session。'Session tab'为CLI内多任务标签命名，非meee2的人机协议同构概念。My Work视图与git worktree隔离会话与baseline 6/17 GA内容重叠。
competitors.content_hash: github.blog全域(feed+文章页)本次仍均403，转WebSearch。检索到两条晚于6/20 baseline的变化（均6/23）：1) Copilot CLI新终端界面GA，引入Session/Gists/Issues/Pull requests多标签布局；2) Copilot App新增BYOK支持，可用自有模型provider(含Anthropic/Ollama等)运行agen

changes.description: Copilot CLI新终端界面GA：Session/Gists/Issues/PR多标签布局，工具配置改为guided in-session体验
changes.evidence: "Press Tab to move between the default Session tab and a Gists tab"
changes.meee2_relevance: 表面使用'Session'术语但为CLI内标签页命名，非跨session/跨owner协议，锚点1不成立

changes.description: Copilot App支持BYOK，可用OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama等自有模型跑agent session
changes.evidence: "run agent sessions against your own model providers, including OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Microsoft Foundry, Anthropic, LM Studio, Ollama"

key_findings: Copilot CLI/App两项6/23更新均为功能扩展，未触及meee2核心锚点
My Work视图/git worktree隔离与baseline 6/17 GA内容同批次，非新变化

competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
fetched_urls: WebSearch:new AI workspace productivity tool launch June 2026 site:producthunt.com
WebSearch:NotchSpace Mac notch workspace AI agent features
competitors.raw_snapshot: PH feed与HN Algolia本次仍均403，转WebSearch兜底。今日/近期PH上新中识别到一组结构性信号——多款独立'Mac notch做AI agent外围监控层'产品集中出现：Notchcode（'turns your MacBook notch into an ambient monitor for your AI coding agents...run multiple Claude Code and Codex sessions at once without losing track of them'）、AgentNotch（'macOS menu bar app that lives in your Mac's notch...Watch as Claude Code and OpenAI Codex think, read files, and execute tools — all without leaving your editor'）、NotchSpace/MacNotch/NotchIA/NotchPad等。命中watch_keywords：menu bar+session+agent+background(ambient)，≥2命中。MeshPilot/1DevTool为baseline已记录的重复出现，非新；Claude Cowork Projects为Anthropic自有产品(已在claude-ai条目下追踪)，非独立新竞品。
competitors.content_hash: PH feed与HN Algolia本次仍均403，转WebSearch兜底。今日/近期PH上新中识别到一组结构性信号——多款独立'Mac notch做AI agent外围监控层'产品集中出现：Notchcode（'turns your MacBook notch into an ambient monitor for your AI coding agents...run multiple Cl

changes.description: 一组独立开发者产品(Notchcode/AgentNotch/NotchSpace等)集中将'Mac notch'做成AI coding agent的外围监控层，多session不抢焦点地ambient可见
changes.evidence: "turns your MacBook notch into an ambient monitor for your AI coding agents...run multiple Claude Code and Codex sessions at once without losing track of them" / "lives in your Mac's notch...Watch as Claude Code and OpenAI Codex think, read files, and execute tools — all without leaving your editor"
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点5（peripheral层，不切焦点）直接相关，且部分触及锚点1（同时监控多个AI session）；但均为单向只读监控，无live link/双向协议，未达crit/hi单品威胁，作为趋势信号记录

key_findings: 独立开发者市场已自发出现'notch作为AI agent peripheral层'的产品聚类（至少6款：Notchcode/AgentNotch/NotchSpace/MacNotch/NotchIA/NotchPad），验证了meee2锚点5的方向但产品形态局限于只读监控，建议下次报告挑选Notchcode或AgentNotch加入sources.json长期追踪
MeshPilot本次依旧出现，与6/22报告记录重复，PH feed对同一产品有持续展示，非每日全新

alerts.headline: Claude Design新增Code Sync：canvas设计稿与代码仓库双向同步（/design-sync、/design），直接触碰meee2锚点2
alerts.evidence: "Developers can use /design-sync to pull a design system into Claude Design, while /design lets them create, edit, and sync design projects from the terminal"（WebSearch转述第三方报道，非官方原文，anthropic.com直连持续403待下次核实）
alerts.action_suggestion: 下次报告优先尝试直连anthropic.com/news/claude-design-anthropic-labs核实官方原文；评估meee2的cross-tool live link机制与此功能在'是否真正双向、是否snapshot'上的具体差异，作为差异化沟通素材

alerts.competitor_name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
alerts.headline: 独立开发者market已聚类出现'Mac notch作为AI agent外围监控层'产品（Notchcode/AgentNotch等6+款），验证meee2锚点5方向但形态仍是只读监控
alerts.evidence: "turns your MacBook notch into an ambient monitor for your AI coding agents...run multiple Claude Code and Codex sessions at once without losing track of them"
alerts.action_suggestion: 将Notchcode或AgentNotch加入sources.json长期追踪其是否从只读监控演进为可交互/可戳的peripheral层；评估是否需要在meee2的菜单栏定位中更明确强调'5字戳任何session'的交互性优势
